US-NY.name: New York
US-NY.threat: Professional malpractice; mandatory MFA/encryption as duty of competence.
US-NY.hook: NY RPC 1.6(c) now treats cybersecurity as a professional duty. Missing DMARC/SPF exposes your firm to malpractice claims and disciplinary action.
US-NY.violationHook2026: NY RPC 1.6(c): Mandatory MFA/encryption as duty of competence.

US-CA.name: California
US-CA.hook: The CCPA 2026 update enables automated audits. Unauthenticated email and weak privacy controls increase per-violation exposure.
US-CA.violationHook2026: CCPA Jan 2026: Automated audits; per-violation penalties.

US-NYDFS.name: NYC Financial
US-NYDFS.threat: Section 500.12 (MFA Migration): Missing MFA for any info system access (mandatory as of Nov 2025). $2M+ civil penalty.
US-NYDFS.hook: Under NYDFS Section 500.12, missing MFA and email authentication (DMARC/SPF) is now a $2M+ civil penalty exposure. 2026 enforcement is active.
US-NYDFS.violationHook2026: NYDFS Section 500.12 (MFA Migration): Missing MFA for any info system access (Mandatory as of Nov 2025).

UK.name: UK / London
UK.threat: Article 21: Failure to implement Basic Cyber Hygiene (DMARC/SPF/MFA). €10M or 2% of global turnover.
UK.hook: NIS2 Article 21 requires basic cyber hygiene including email authentication. Failure can result in €10,000,000 or 2% of global annual turnover. SRA enforcement runs in parallel.
UK.violationHook2026: NIS2 Article 21: Failure to implement Basic Cyber Hygiene (DMARC/SPF/MFA).

ON.name: Ontario
ON.hook: LawPRO has highlighted missing SPF/DMARC as a primary vector for wire fraud targeting Ontario firms. Baseline controls are expected by insurers.
ON.fineExposure: Wire fraud liability; professional indemnity implications.
ON.violationHook2026: LawPRO Practice Standards: Wire fraud and insurer expectations for baseline controls.

HIPAA.name: Healthcare (US)
HIPAA.threat: 2026 Modernization Rule: Failure to technically enforce encryption for all ePHI in transit. Tier 4 Willful Neglect annual cap.
HIPAA.hook: HIPAA 2026 Modernization Rule mandates encryption of all ePHI in transit. Unauthenticated email creates audit findings and OCR exposure—up to Tier 4 willful neglect cap.
HIPAA.violationHook2026: 2026 Modernization Rule: Failure to technically enforce encryption for all ePHI in transit.

PHIPA.name: Healthcare (Ontario)
PHIPA.hook: PHIPA requires safeguards for personal health information. Email authentication is a baseline control for integrity and breach prevention.
PHIPA.violationHook2026: PHIPA: Safeguards for personal health information; breach reporting.
